title: The New Story Is Already True
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for closing the door on inherited struggle
excerpt: An energy statement practice for Day 14. The release names the generational struggle as complete; the allow opens the door to a family story of ease, wealth, and stability.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Day 14 theme and ritual structure from The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448) — Week 2 Ritual: The Ancestral Release & Wealth Lineage Activation.

practice.whenToUse: On Day 14 as a verbal close to the Week 2 generational work — when you want to mark the old story as done and the new one as begun.

content.text: An energy statement for Day 14 — the end of the Week 2 generational arc. The release names the inherited struggle as something that is now complete. The allow opens the line for the new story to move forward.
I am ready to release all fear, struggle, and scarcity passed down through my family line. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow ease, wealth, and stability for myself and every generation that follows. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
(Rebecca Page, 2024). The spoken lines here are drawn from the Week 2 Ritual in
